title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.260 - Commission and authority may provide assistance, how
text:
238.260.  Commission and authority may provide assistance, how. — The commission and local transportation authorities may contract with a district to provide it assistance in project funding, promotion, planning, design, right-of-way acquisition, relocation assistance services, construction, maintenance, and operation.  The commission or any local transportation authority may charge the district a reasonable fee, not exceeding the actual cost of providing the service.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 59) 
Effective 5-30-90
